caption: A man with blond hair, glasses, and a mustache sits in a room with a light-colored brick wall, wearing a blue long-sleeved shirt and silver over-ear headphones. To his left is a decorated Christmas tree with colorful lights, and behind him is a framed blue and white graphic containing the number "20". A black microphone is positioned in front of him. Across the sequence, the man speaks and gesticulates with his hands. In the initial moments, he looks slightly off-camera with a neutral expression. As the scene progresses, he opens his mouth wider and his expression becomes more animated, gesturing with his right hand. His head shifts slightly in position, and his mouth moves as he continues to speak, conveying an increasing level of energy and emphasis in his delivery.
